function.name: get_current_datetime
function.description: Returns the exact current date and time in UTC. Trigger this when you need the current time, today's date, or a precise timestamp to answer the user.

function.name: web_search
function.description: Executes an internet search to retrieve real-time data. Use this to find current events, up-to-date facts, or external technical documentation not present in your training data.

function.name: read_file
function.description: Reads and returns the exact text content of a specified local file. Use this immediately when asked to inspect, analyze, debug, or summarize a specific file.

path.description: The relative or absolute path to the file.

function.name: list_dir
function.description: Returns a list of all files and folders within a given directory. Use this to inspect project structures, verify file existence, or explore the local file system.

path.description: The path to list. Use '.' for the current directory.

function.name: get_os_info
function.description: Retrieves system environment details including OS type (Windows/Linux/macOS), CPU architecture, and Python version. Use this to diagnose environment context or hardware capabilities.
